Bash(npx -y -p playwright node -e 'const { chromium } = require\("playwright"\); \(async\(\) => { const outBase = "C:/Users/11919/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/f--donorsexhibition/211815ba-7649-4066-aba9-7e07deb64e07/tasks"; let browser; try { browser = await chromium.launch\({ headless: true, channel: "msedge" }\); } catch \(e\) { browser = await chromium.launch\({ headless: true }\); } const page = await browser.newPage\({ viewport: { width: 1440, height: 900 }, deviceScaleFactor: 1 }\); await page.goto\("http://127.0.0.1:5173", { waitUntil: "networkidle" }\); await page.getByRole\("button", { name: "进入展览" }\).click\(\); await page.waitForTimeout\(1200\); const title = page.locator\("text=曹氏归义军联姻家族"\).first\(\); await title.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded\(\); await page.waitForTimeout\(1200\); await page.screenshot\({ path: `${outBase}/chapter2-marriage-before.png`, fullPage: false }\); for \(let i = 0; i < 22; i += 1\) { await page.mouse.wheel\(0, 900\); await page.waitForTimeout\(180\); } await page.screenshot\({ path: `${outBase}/chapter2-marriage-after.png`, fullPage: false }\); console.log\("saved", `${outBase}/chapter2-marriage-before.png`, `${outBase}/chapter2-marriage-after.png`\); await browser.close\(\); }\)\(\).catch\(err => { console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')
